This volume is no. 32 of the K.S.T.S. series but it was incorrectly printed as volume 31 on both the english and sanskrit title pages. In one specimen examined the volume no. had been altered by hand (possibly by the printers or publishers) to the correct volume number (i.e. 32) but in another specimen examined it had not been corrected. This volume is erroneous listed as vol. 31 in many (but not all) library and other types of bibliographic records examined including the --Descriptive Analysis of The Kashmir Series of Texts & Studie--, but the first volume of The Svacchanda Tantra is invariably correctly titled as vol. 31 of the K.S.T.S. series.

The corrections listed in the printed edition have been made directly to the text.
